My Journey

Hello! I'm Shivam Kumar, a passionate developer with a deep fascination for transforming complex problems into clean, working digital solutions.

My journey in tech began with curious exploration of Java and C++ and has evolved into full-stack development — building everything from Augmented Reality anatomy apps to real-time stock market dashboards with JWT authentication.

I specialize in crafting responsive, user-centered applications using React, Node.js, and modern web technologies. Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE at Lovely Professional University.

My Approach

I believe in creating technology that's not just functional but meaningful. Every line of code I write aims to solve a real problem and enhance the user's experience.

I value clean architecture, collaborative teamwork, and continuous learning as the foundations of great software. What drives me is the intersection of problem-solving and creativity — finding that perfect balance between logic and design.

🫀 Anatomy AR Pro

  • 3D models of organs, bones & body systems
